{{Infobox group
| name = Dreadgod cult
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There is a cult of a [[Dreadgod]] that operates beyond the [[Empire]]'s southeastern border.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Tiberian]]'s technique would destroy the [[Dreadgod cult]] if [[Yerin]] used [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Star Sect]] is being called a [[Dreadgod cult]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Everyone in a [[Dreadgod cult]] came from humble beginnings.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|It's the cult of a Dreadgod,” she said, so softly that he wouldn't have been able to pick up her words without his Iron body. “Usually, they operate beyond the Empire's southeastern border.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
